summary: Comprehensive testing of Barber Management and Service Management features. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows tested and working correctly including: Salon OTP login, Barber CRUD, Service CRUD, and Barber-Service assignment with custom pricing.

issues: OTP value (123456) shown in toast notification - should be removed in production

action_items: Remove OTP display from toast notification in production (currently shows 'OTP: 123456')
Consider adding confirmation dialog for Delete Barber action (currently only Delete Service has confirmation)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper use of data-testid attributes for testing
Service assignment UI is well-designed with checkbox + price input pattern
Proper error handling with toast notifications for success/failure states
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed barbers and services for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Barber Management and Service Management features are working. Dashboard has 4 tabs: Token Queue, Barbers, Services, Salon Info. Barber expansion shows service assignment with checkboxes and custom pricing. OTP is hardcoded to 123456 for testing.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Notifications: Logged to console, not actually sent

features_tested.salon_otp_login: PASS - Send OTP, verify with 123456, redirects to dashboard
features_tested.barber_add: PASS - Add new barber with name, mobile, experience, category
features_tested.barber_edit: PASS - Edit barber details (name, mobile, experience, category)
features_tested.barber_delete: PASS - Delete button visible and functional
features_tested.barber_expand: PASS - Click barber card to expand and see service assignment UI
features_tested.barber_service_assignment: PASS - Checkboxes for services with custom price inputs
features_tested.barber_service_save: PASS - Save Services button updates barber-service assignments
features_tested.service_view: PASS - Grid view of all services with name, description, duration, price
features_tested.service_add: PASS - Add new service with all fields
features_tested.service_edit: PASS - Inline edit mode for services
features_tested.service_delete: PASS - Delete button visible with confirmation dialog
